explanations.3: This starts a two-column layout using a special markup syntax called Pandoc—the triple colons tell the renderer to split the content into side-by-side sections.
explanations.4: The curly braces with `.column` and `width="70%"` specify that this column takes up 70% of the horizontal space.
explanations.8: This is the second column, which takes up the remaining 30% of the width.
explanations.15: The `::: notes` block creates speaker notes that won't display on the slide itself—only the presenter sees these when giving the talk.
